top_signals.title: Indo Rate Hike Signals Resolve to Ease Angst: Robeco
top_signals.summary: Robeco's Thu Ha Chow sees Indonesia’s out-of-cycle interest rate hike this week as reflecting policymakers’ willingness to address investor concerns. Speaking on The China Show, Chow added that while Indonesia is at the beginning of a turnaround story, it’s not quite there yet. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Max severity Ivanti Sentry vulnerability now exploited in attacks
top_signals.summary: Attackers are now targeting a recently patched maximum-severity flaw in Ivanti Sentry, enabling them to execute code with root privileges on Internet-exposed secure mobile gateways. [...]
